name: edit_file
description:
Edit an existing file or create a new file within registered source directories. Supports string replacement and file creation. All text-based file types are supported.

Use this tool when:
- You need to modify an existing file (use str_replace with the exact text to find and its replacement)
- You need to create a new file (use create with the file content)

For str_replace: old_str must match exactly once in the file. Include enough context lines to ensure uniqueness.

path.description: Path to the file (absolute or relative to a source directory)

action.description: Edit action: 'str_replace' to find-and-replace text in an existing file, 'create' to create a new file

old_str.description: For str_replace: exact string to find in the file (must match exactly once)

new_str.description: For str_replace: replacement string. For create: file content
